design_intent: Refined Industrial living room with exposed concrete, warm leather, matte black steel, and dark reclaimed wood; streamlined silhouettes, utilitarian details, and a moody but inviting atmosphere.

selected_pieces.product_name: Malinta Contemporary Tufted Club Chair Dark Brown/Espresso
selected_pieces.placement_note: Place as a single lounge chair angled 30 degrees toward the sofa, on the right side of the conversation area, with a small black metal side table beside it.

selected_pieces.product_name: Manila Round Hammered Drum Coffee Table Brass - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Center it in front of the seating group, leaving a clear 16-18 inch circulation gap around the sofa and chair, with its brass finish catching the soft ambient light.

selected_pieces.product_name: Costway TV Stand for Up to 55" TVs Entertainment Center with 3-Tier Storage Shelves & Cable Hole Black/White
selected_pieces.placement_note: Float it along the main wall opposite the seating, centered under the TV area, with the open shelving used for books and a few dark ceramic objects.

selected_pieces.product_name: 7'X10' Vintage Tufted Distressed Area Rug Tan - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Lay it under the front legs of the sofa and chair, centered on the coffee table, to soften the concrete floor and define the lounge zone with a muted, worn-in pattern.
Style on the TV stand’s top shelf, slightly off-center beside a stack of books, as a small reflective accent that echoes the coffee table’s brass tone.

selected_pieces.product_name: Square Composite Indoor Outdoor Planter Pot 12"x12"x14" Charcoal Gray - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Place in a rear corner near the concrete wall with a tall architectural plant, adding vertical balance and a soft organic shape against the hard industrial surfaces.

selected_pieces.product_name: 2pk Square Cotton Woven Stripe Throw Pillows Neutral/Ivory - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Layer one pillow on the leather chair and the other at the outer corner of the sofa to introduce a subtle woven texture without interrupting the dark tonal palette.
